subject: Productivity & Improvement Tasks
body:
## Tasks for LANE_NAME

- Review and update trust-store entries
- Execute recovery test suite
- Run stress/throughput tests
- Verify canonical key derivation
- Generate lane-specific status report
- Deliver report to SwarmMind outbox

Deadline: 2026-04-23T18:00:00Z

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Field "to" value "LANE_NAME" not in allowed values: archivist, library, swarmmind, kernel; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
